skill.name: SEO Content Planner
skill.description: Creates comprehensive content outlines and topic clusters for SEO. Plans content calendars and identifies topic gaps. Use PROACTIVELY for content strategy and planning.
skill.summary: AI-powered tool for creating SEO content outlines, topic clusters, and content calendars.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code. This is a text-based SEO content planning assistant that generates content outlines, topic clusters, and content calendars. No network calls, filesystem access, environment variable usage, or external command execution detected. No security concerns identified.

content.user_title: Plan SEO Content with Topic Clusters
content.value_statement: Create structured content outlines and topic clusters to improve search rankings and build topical authority.
actual_capabilities: Generate detailed content outlines with hierarchical structure
Create topic cluster maps with pillar and supporting content
Develop 30-60 day content calendars with publishing schedules
Identify content gaps and opportunities in existing strategies
Map search intent for target keywords
Plan internal linking strategies for topical authority
limitations: Does not perform actual keyword research or search volume analysis
Does not access Google Analytics or SEO tools for data
Cannot analyze existing content for optimization opportunities
Does not guarantee specific search rankings

use_cases.title: Blog Content Strategy
use_cases.description: Create a comprehensive blog content plan with topic clusters to build topical authority and improve organic search visibility.

use_cases.title: Website Content Overhaul
use_cases.description: Plan new website content structure including pillar pages and supporting articles for better SEO performance.

use_cases.title: Content Calendar Planning
use_cases.description: Develop a structured content calendar with priorities, word counts, and internal linking targets for consistent publishing.
use_cases.target_user: Content teams and digital marketing agencies

prompt_templates.title: Basic Content Outline
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a content outline for an article about [TOPIC]. Include introduction, main sections, and conclusion. Target audience is [AUDIENCE]. Primary keyword is [KEYWORD].
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick outline generation for a single article

prompt_templates.title: Topic Cluster Planning
prompt_templates.prompt: Develop a topic cluster around [MAIN TOPIC]. Include one pillar page and 5-7 supporting articles. For each piece, provide title, target keyword, search intent, and key subtopics to cover.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building topical authority with cluster content

prompt_templates.title: Content Calendar Creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-day content calendar for [INDUSTRY/NICHE]. Include publishing dates, content titles, target keywords, content types, word count targets, and internal linking opportunities for each post.

prompt_templates.title: Content Gap Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the following list of existing content topics: [TOPIC LIST]. Identify gaps and suggest 10-15 new content ideas that would strengthen topical authority. Group them into logical topic clusters.
prompt_templates.scenario: Finding content opportunities in existing strategy

output_examples.input: Create a content outline for an article about remote work productivity. Target audience is business professionals. Primary keyword is remote work productivity tips.
output_examples.output:
Title: Remote Work Productivity Tips

Intent: Informational
Word Count: 2000

I. Introduction
   - Hook: Statistics on remote work productivity
   - Value proposition: Why productivity matters remote
   - Overview: What this guide covers

II. Setting Up Your Workspace
   A. Physical environment optimization
   B. Digital tool selection
   
III. Time Management Strategies
   A. Time blocking techniques
   B. Pomodoro method adaptation
   ...

Deliverables: Content outline, topic cluster map, internal linking plan

output_examples.input: Develop a topic cluster around sustainable living.
output_examples.output:
Pillar Page: Complete Guide to Sustainable Living

Supporting Articles:
1. Zero Waste Kitchen Guide
2. Eco-Friendly Transportation Options
3. Energy Conservation at Home
4. Sustainable Fashion Choices
5. Water Conservation Tips

Cluster Map: Each article links to pillar and related supports

best_practices: Start with comprehensive pillar content before building supporting articles
Map search intent correctly - informational for guides, transactional for product pages
Prioritize content based on search volume and business relevance
anti_patterns: Creating content without clear search intent alignment
Building thin supporting content that does not add value
Ignoring internal linking opportunities in content planning

faq.question: How does this skill help with SEO?
faq.answer: This skill creates structured content plans that align with SEO best practices including topic clusters, search intent mapping, and internal linking strategies.

faq.question: Can this skill perform keyword research?
faq.answer: No, this skill focuses on content planning and structuring. It uses provided keywords but does not access search volume data or keyword tools.

faq.question: What is a topic cluster?
faq.answer: A topic cluster is a group of interlinked content pieces organized around a pillar page. It helps search engines understand your topical authority.

faq.question: How long is the content calendar?
faq.answer: The skill generates 30-60 day content calendars with weekly breakdowns, topic assignments, and publishing priorities.

faq.question: Does this skill write the actual content?
faq.answer: No, this skill creates content outlines and plans. It does not generate full articles or content copy.

faq.question: Can I use this with Claude Code or Codex?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for AI-assisted content creation workflows.
